name: Veal Piccata
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the veal lightly.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and dredge in flour.
3. Melt butter in a skillet and brown the veal quickly, turning once.
4. Do not try to cook all the veal at once; it probably won't fit.
5. Remove the veal and place on a warm platter. Pour off excess fat.
6. Add 3 tbsp water and scrape up the brown residue.
7. Add lemon juice and pour sauce over the meat.
8. Sprinkle with parsley. Garnish with lemon slices.
